title: santalum insulare var. raivavense
intro: Santalum insulare var. raivavense, also known as the Raivavae Sandalwood, is a variety of the Santalum insulare tree, native to the island of Raivavae in French Polynesia. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Santalum insulare var. raivavense include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin conditions. Santalum insulare var. raivavense is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, perfumes, and skincare products, due to its unique fragrance and medicinal properties.
